Title: Relates to expanded approval power for actions taken at meetings of the New York state energy research and development authority
Summary: Expands approval power for actions taken at meetings of the New York state energy research and development authority to include the temporary president of the senate, the speaker of the assembly, the minority leader of the senate, and the minority leader of the assembly.
ActClause: AN ACT to amend the public authorities law, in relation to expanded approval power
